title: Example Case Study Title
scenario: Describe the incident here. Include what happened, when, where, and the immediate causes. Then describe the organizational and systemic factors that contributed.

cards.title: The Incident
cards.question: Summarize the key events that led to this incident.
cards.hint: What happened? When? What were the immediate causes?

cards.title: Identify Factors
cards.question: Which Dirty Dozen factors contributed to this incident? Provide specific evidence.
cards.hint: Review: Communication, Complacency, Knowledge, Distraction, Teamwork, Fatigue, Resources, Pressure, Assertiveness, Stress, Awareness, Norms

cards.title: Failed Layers
cards.question: Identify at least three defensive layers that failed in this incident.
cards.hint: Consider design, regulation, organization, supervision, technical execution

cards.title: Root Cause Analysis
cards.question: Using any human factors framework, explain why this incident occurred and what could prevent recurrence.
cards.hint: Go beyond the individual to systemic factors
